reapack.name: DE-CyberDenoiserPro.jsfx
reapack.about: # Cyber-Denoiser PRO 10-band high-precision forensic denoiser. Optimized for 0.18% RT CPU performance.

reapack.name: DE-CyberDenoiserLite.jsfx
reapack.about: # Cyber-Denoiser LITE 5-band efficiency-first denoiser for high track counts. Optimized for 0.12% RT CPU performance.

reapack.name: DE-CyberGate.jsfx
reapack.about: # Cyber-Gate Single-band ultra-low overhead forensic gate. Targeting 0.05% RT CPU performance.
